```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;">stage</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#C4881A;line-height:1;">02</span>
  <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Add a planner</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;gap:1em;align-items:center;">

  <div style="text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.4em;">when scope keeps drifting</div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.7;color:#564232;">
    <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Tasks start under-defined</li>
    <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:0.2em;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>Implementation ≠ what you wanted</li>
    <li style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;align-items:flex-start;"><span style="color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;">▸</span>First draft solves a different problem</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;">
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1.5px solid #C4881A;color:#7A5410;padding:0.35em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;">planning session</div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.85em;">↓</div>
   <div style="background:#FEF5E7;color:#C4881A;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px dashed #C4881A;">
    SPEC.md
   </div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.85em;">↓ fresh session reads</div>
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:1.5px solid #2C8475;color:#1F5E54;padding:0.35em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;">implementation</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-style:italic;">
  same shape as Claude Code's plan mode — scaled across sessions
 </div>

</div>
```
